/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/core/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/core/Engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/core/Entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/core/ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/graphics/Mesh.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/graphics/Model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/graphics/ModelLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/graphics/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/graphics/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/JotaEngine.dir/ui/ImGuiManager.cpp.o -o ../bin/JotaEngine  ../external/imgui/libimgui.a -lglfw -lassimp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so /usr/local/lib/libglfw3.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
